_README: Copy this file to data/secrets.json (same folder) and fill it in. data/secrets.json is gitignored, so it NEVER goes to GitHub. It lives only on the machine that runs the server (your Surface).
_KEEP_README: For the 📝 Send to Keep button. See scripts/KEEP-SETUP.md to get a master token (one-time, via node scripts/keep-token.js).
